title: Savory Crumbly Paleo Potato Stir-fry
description: A refreshing and energizing Polish dish featuring small potatoes sautéed with savory seasonings in a paleo-friendly manner.

ingredients.name: paleo-friendly tamari soy sauce
ingredients.notes: or any paleo-friendly seasoning of your choice

ingredients.name: paleo-friendly nutritional yeast flakes
ingredients.notes: optional, adds a cheesy flavor and boost in protein and calcium

instructions: Drizzle the diced potatoes with olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Toss to coat evenly.
Arrange the potato slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, spread them out in a single layer, and roast for about 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the edges.
While the potatoes are roasting, heat up 1 tbsp of olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic cloves and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Stir in the paleo-friendly tamari soy sauce and nutritional yeast flakes (if using), and cook for another minute, stirring constantly to combine all ingredients evenly.
Add the roasted potatoes to the skillet with the garlic-soy mixture, tossing them well to coat. Cook for about 2-3 minutes more or until heated through and thoroughly mixed.
Remove from heat immediately after the stir-fry is finished cooking. Garnish with fresh parsley leaves and serve hot as a snack or side dish.
